# Level One

> Level One is an automation and digital growth agency based in Edinburgh,
> Scotland, serving small businesses across the United Kingdom. It builds
> websites, workflow automation, review and reputation systems, and local
> search growth — positioned as a single "systems and growth" partner.

The key point is: Level One helps UK small businesses — trades, dental
practices, hospitality operators and property professionals — win time and
customers by building systems that handle the busywork.

## What Level One does

- Websites That Convert: fast, search-ready websites engineered to turn
  visitors into enquiries.
- Workflow Automation: bookings, follow-ups, invoicing and admin handled
  automatically, so no lead waits overnight.
- Reviews & Reputation: five-star reviews requested, tracked and answered on
  autopilot.
- Local Search Growth: local visibility and content that compounds month
  after month.

## Who it is for

- Tradespeople (plumbers, electricians, builders and similar UK trades)
- Dental practices
- Hospitality operators (cafes, restaurants, hotels)
- Property professionals

## How engagements work

1. Free 30-minute growth mapping call: an audit of the business's funnel to
   find bottlenecks and show where automation moves the needle.
2. Written proposal: fixed scope, timeline and price. No hourly billing.
3. Build: weekly updates, a working product, typically four to ten weeks
   from kickoff to launch.
4. Optional ongoing management: month-to-month retainer for monitoring,
   optimisation and iteration.

Pricing: fixed-price projects from £5k, most engagements £10k–£50k. Clients
keep everything on launch — code, files and documentation.

## Facts

- Founded team: small, senior, UK-based (Edinburgh, Scotland).
- Response time: enquiries answered within 24 hours.
- Business model: fixed-price projects plus optional monthly retainers.
- Category: automation agency, digital growth agency, web design and local
  search services for UK small businesses.
